title: Personal Website (this site!)
description: Modern, personal portfolio built with Astro, React, and Tailwind CSS. Features smooth animations for the cools.

title: JobGlove
description: Docker containerized web application to tailor job resumes based on job descriptions using multiple AI Providers.

title: Drift Guard
description: Full-Stack Web Application for monitoring and alerting on data drift in machine learning models, built with NextJS and Python.

title: Sous Clip
description: Self-hosted, privacy focused recipe-extraction app from short form cooking content

title: Paper Trail
description: A hybrid PDF/OCR extraction pipeline that processes open-source bug reports, with a Neo4j knowledge graph and a hybrid retrieval RAG pipeline.
